name: Wave 3: input/security hardening / input_security / batch 3
description: Small focused packet for 4 open bug(s). Uses auto/* routing so Praxis can choose lower-cost admitted models where suitable.
outcome_goal: Drive BUG-EBE6B0E1, BUG-3E0DDC73, BUG-616A0D2E, BUG-94DB9A53 to proof-backed terminal outcomes or leave explicit blockers in CLOSEOUT.md.

token_policy.default_model_routing: explicit lower-cost openai/gpt-5.4-mini for plan/verify/contained packets; openai/gpt-5.4 only for core authority execution
token_policy.strong_model_only_when: authority design or invasive implementation genuinely requires it

anti_requirements: Do not widen beyond listed bug IDs.
Do not resolve FIXED without validates_fix evidence.
Do not use ad hoc SQL for bug status or evidence writes.
Do not create wrapper scripts for behavior that belongs in runtime, registry, event bus, or DB authority.
Use praxis workflow discover before implementing new code or patterns.

jobs.label: Plan input_security packet
jobs.prompt:
Orient from Praxis.db standing orders first. Then use praxis workflow discover/recall as needed to plan this packet.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-EBE6B0E1 [P2/ARCHITECTURE]: security-review-2026-04-22-cors: REST API defaults to wildcard CORS origin
- BUG-3E0DDC73 [P3/ARCHITECTURE]: input-validation::mcp::operator — silent coercion hides type errors across operator tools
- BUG-616A0D2E [P3/VERIFY]: input-validation::contracts::domain — validate_workflow_request collapses distinct errors to request.graph_invalid
- BUG-94DB9A53 [P3/ARCHITECTURE]: input-validation::dispatch::_dispatch_standard_post — only structural JSON check, no schema

Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-3-input-security-input-security-3/PLAN.md with: authority model, files to read, files allowed to change, verification path, stop boundary, and per-bug intended outcome. Do not edit code in this job.

jobs.label: Execute input_security packet
jobs.prompt:
Read Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-3-input-security-input-security-3/PLAN.md first. Implement the smallest durable fix or document a proof-backed DEFERRED/WONT_FIX outcome.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-EBE6B0E1 [P2/ARCHITECTURE]: security-review-2026-04-22-cors: REST API defaults to wildcard CORS origin
- BUG-3E0DDC73 [P3/ARCHITECTURE]: input-validation::mcp::operator — silent coercion hides type errors across operator tools
- BUG-616A0D2E [P3/VERIFY]: input-validation::contracts::domain — validate_workflow_request collapses distinct errors to request.graph_invalid
- BUG-94DB9A53 [P3/ARCHITECTURE]: input-validation::dispatch::_dispatch_standard_post — only structural JSON check, no schema

Rules: use praxis workflow discover before new code; keep writes inside the active Praxis workspace boundary; do not cross Coder/Recruiter boundaries; do not resolve bugs in this job. Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-3-input-security-input-security-3/EXECUTION.md with changed files, evidence collected, and intended terminal status per bug.

jobs.label: Verify and resolve input_security packet
jobs.prompt:
Read Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-3-input-security-input-security-3/PLAN.md and Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-3-input-security-input-security-3/EXECUTION.md. Run the narrowest meaningful verifier. Use only praxis workflow bugs attach_evidence and praxis workflow bugs resolve for bug state.
